purpose: Find the smallest preregistered P16 perturbation sigma whose train-only signal is distinguishable from measured inference noise.

scientific_rationale.grid_reason: geometric doubling from 2x to 8x Retry5; under a local linear response approximation 0.0024 is the first grid point expected to clear Retry5 noise, with one bounded fallback
